notes:
What's new in 1.3.0:
• Full Linux support (AppImage) + official Firefox extension.
• Clip: new MP3 (audio-only) export; frame-exact cuts, no start stutter.
• Add Download: multiple windows + batch paste; locked file extension.
• Reworked Queue, Torrents & Home screens.
• Faster 4K/VP9/AV1 merges; YouTube & Windows-clip audio fixes.
• Security & Windows SAC hardening.
